name: AI Infograph Expansion
objective: Expand AI/LLM infograph page with 7 new topics: Transformer Architecture, Prompt Engineering, Fine-tuning vs RAG, VLM & Multimodal Models, LLM Evaluation, Agents & Tool Use, and Alignment & Safety
exit_criteria: Prompt Engineering section with interactive examples implemented
Fine-tuning vs RAG comparison section implemented
LLM Evaluation section with benchmark visualizer implemented
Agents & Tool Use section with function calling examples implemented
All sections follow existing visual style (purple accent, dark mode, 3-column grids)
No duplicate topics from existing content
